scenarios.description: Chaining setTrackPosition calls maintains fluent API and returns same instance each time
scenarios.precondition: Parser created via Parser.htmlParser() with default trackPosition=false
scenarios.expectedResult: Each setTrackPosition invocation returns the same parser instance and trackPosition reflects the last call

scenarios.description: Setting trackPosition before newInstance propagates state to the copied parser
scenarios.expectedResult: newInstance() returns a new Parser with trackPosition=true
pseudocode: TEST TC04 setTrackPosition with newInstance propagation
